Taxonomy_y: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Ecdysozoa; Arthropoda; Hexapoda; Insecta; Pterygota; Neoptera; Endopterygota; Lepidoptera; Glossata; Ditrysia; Urodoidea; Urodidae; Wockia
Assembly: The assembly ilWocAspe1.hap1.1 is based on 37x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by Project Psyche (https://www.projectpsyche.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Z chromosome identified based BUSCO gene painting with ancestral Merian elements~(https://doi.org/10.1038/s41559-024-02329-4).

Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. A large number of centromeric repeats is in the unlocalised sequences. This genome has been assembled using PacBio and HiC data and phased. The result is two curated haplotypes.'Chromosome Z identified by identification of ancestral Z BUSCO genes' Z chromosome identified based BUSCO gene painting with ancestral Merian elements (https://doi.org/10.1038/s41559-024-02329-4). Chromosomes Z and W were identified by copy number in the diploid assembly. A fusion event between the Z chromosome and an ancestral autosome is observed in the genome.
